Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: Middle-aged man with deep gray eyes and a black Victorian trench coat, always wearing a unique black top hat that appears split in half.
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Described as wearing a black trench coat, hatless, with gray eyes.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Elderly man in a classic black scholar's robe whose eyes turn pitch-black during ritualistic magic.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Lives in a bungalow in the North Borough suburbs; garden contains roses and gold mint; keeps a piano in his living room in memory of his deceased wife.
Old Neil.source_notes: Described as being dressed in a black classic robe.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black scholar's robe with silver embroidery, starched white cravat, dark wool trousers

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale male with a scholarly bearing, wearing a halved black top hat and a black Victorian frock coat, frequently using a topaz spirit pendulum on a silver chain
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver pocket watch patterned with vine-leaves
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Klein mentally notes that he recently advanced and has yet to completely digest the Seer potion.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: black Victorian frock coat, halved black top hat, starched white shirt, scholarly bearing
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat) and carries a silver chain with a pure topaz pendulum in his left sleeve

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.distinguishing_features: Captain of the Black King, known as the Son of the Steam.
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Diary reveals he was born in Intis Kingdom, sailed the Black King, chose the Savant pathway, and was called Son of the Steam.

Mr. Zaratul.hair_style: slicked back, long enough to touch the collar
Mr. Zaratul.unique_identifier: mysterious figure who first articulated the 'acting' method for digesting extraordinary potions; described by Roselle as simply 'mysterious Mr. Zaratul'
Mr. Zaratul.era_clothing_lock: long black Victorian frock coat with deep lapels over a dark charcoal waistcoat, crisp white cravat, black wool trousers, polished black Oxford shoes, black leather gloves
Mr. Zaratul.face_description: sharp angular face with high cheekbones, deep-set pale grey eyes under a heavy stern brow, thin lips that rarely betray expression
Mr. Zaratul.visual_anchor: late 40s tall pale male with sharp angular features, silver-white hair slicked back, deep-set pale grey eyes, always in a long black Victorian frock coat with a crisp white cravat and black leather gloves — the mysterious figure who revealed the secret of 'acting' to Roselle
Mr. Zaratul.color_palette: jet black, pale silver, crisp white, charcoal grey
Mr. Zaratul.distinguishing_features: one of the earliest known sources of the 'acting' method for potion digestion; likely an Extraordinary of significant standing
Mr. Zaratul.source_notes: Referenced in Roselle's 26th May diary entry as 'mysterious Mr. Zaratul' who mentioned the concept of acting. No physical description given; all appearance details guessed to match a knowledgeable, enigmatic Victorian-era Extraordinary.

Lord of Storms.primary_clothing: robes woven from dark storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.face_description: Stern, majestic face with a strong jawline, intense brow arch, and piercing eyes.
Lord of Storms.visual_anchor: ageless male, muscular build, wild dark blue hair, electric blue eyes, wearing robes of storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.color_palette: storm black, dark blue, electric yellow, charcoal grey
Lord of Storms.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Lord of Storms.source_notes: Origin myth details provided by Dunn Smith.

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.distinguishing_features: The back of his chair above the gray fog features a constellation forming the symbol of 'Storm'.
The Hanged Man.faction: Mandated Punisher or pirate secretly absorbed by the Church of Storms
The Hanged Man.role: Sequence 7 Seafarer or Sequence 8 Guardian of the Storm
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Klein's deductions based on The Hanged Man's recent advancements.

Ray Bieber.primary_clothing: Victorian middle-class attire, dark waistcoat and white shirt
Ray Bieber.face_description: Recessed eyes with a tall nose bridge and a sagging philtrum; relatively mild bearing.
Ray Bieber.visual_anchor: 30-year-old male with curly black hair and deep blue eyes, wearing a grey wool frock coat and featuring a sagging philtrum.
Ray Bieber.color_palette: deep blue, charcoal grey, snowy white
Ray Bieber.distinguishing_features: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth; sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.source_notes: Physical details (hair, eyes, tooth, philtrum) confirmed via Old Neil's magical portrait ritual; age and occupation confirmed by police report.
Ray Bieber.unique_identifier: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth and a sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.era_clothing_lock: grey wool frock coat, white linen shirt with a stiff starched collar, dark blue silk cravat, charcoal wool trousers

Antigonus.unique_identifier: surrounded by faint spider-like ethereal threads
Antigonus.era_clothing_lock: tattered black Victorian frock coat over an open white shirt, dark formal trousers, bare feet
Antigonus.face_description: partially hidden behind a thick beard and unkempt hair, visible sharp intense eyes
Antigonus.visual_anchor: tall lean pale male surrounded by faint spider-like ethereal threads, wearing a tattered black Victorian frock coat over an open white shirt
Antigonus.color_palette: black, dark grey, pale white, shadow
Antigonus.source_notes: Mentioned as an illustrious name and family of the Fourth Epoch; appearance guessed.

Tris.primary_clothing: Simple linen shirt, dark vest, worn trousers
Tris.face_description: Round face, looks amiable with a tiny hint of bashfulness.
Tris.visual_anchor: A shy, unremarkable young man with a round, amiable face and soft features, wearing a simple Victorian wool waistcoat and flat cap.
Tris.color_palette: pale cream, light brown, muted grey
Tris.role: Sequence 8 Instigator, culprit of the Alfalfa tragedy
Tris.source_notes: Revealed in the Nighthawks' secret documents.
Tris.unique_identifier: round, amiable face with an unmistakable shy expression; unremarkable boy who retreats to corners
Tris.era_clothing_lock: simple Victorian beige wool waistcoat, white cotton shirt, brown wool trousers, and a modest brown flat cap
